allow: PowerShell(\(Get-Acl "C:\\Program Files\\MongoDB\\Server\\8.3\\data"\).Access | Where-Object { $_.IdentityReference -match 'NetworkService' } | Format-Table IdentityReference, FileSystemRights, AccessControlType -AutoSize; "---"; \(Get-Acl "C:\\Program Files\\MongoDB\\Server\\8.3\\log"\).Access | Where-Object { $_.IdentityReference -match 'NetworkService' } | Format-Table IdentityReference, FileSystemRights, AccessControlType -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-Service MongoDB | Select-Object Status, Name, StartType; "---"; $log = "C:\\Program Files\\MongoDB\\Server\\8.3\\log\\mongod.log"; if \(Test-Path $log\) { "--- last 30 lines of mongod.log ---"; Get-Content $log -Tail 30 } else { 'log still does not exist' }; "---"; "data dir items: $\(@\(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\MongoDB\\Server\\8.3\\data' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count\)")
